label: Introduced self, Trust Point and reason for call
description: Did the adviser introduce themselves by name, state they are from Trust Point Mortgage and Protection Services, and explain the call is to review protection needs?

label: Explained the call is to understand the situation and suitable cover
description: Did the adviser explain they are calling to understand the client's situation and see what cover may be suitable?

label: Stated Trust Point is authorised and regulated by the FCA
description: Did the adviser state that Trust Point Mortgage and Protection Services are authorised and regulated by the FCA?
ai_check: Statement must be present and convey the full regulatory meaning; flag if the wording materially deviates from the approved word-for-word script.

label: Confirmed fully advised, whole-of-market, no fee
description: Did the adviser confirm they work on a fully advised basis with all major insurers/lenders and do not charge a fee?
ai_check: Statement must be present and convey the full regulatory meaning; flag if the wording materially deviates from the approved word-for-word script.

label: Gave the call-recording disclosure
description: Did the adviser confirm all calls are recorded for training and monitoring purposes?
ai_check: Statement must be present and convey the full regulatory meaning; flag if the wording materially deviates from the approved word-for-word script.

label: Set expectations for the fact find
description: Did the adviser explain they will ask about circumstances, commitments, income, family and existing cover before advising?

label: Full Fact Find completed and recorded on the CRM
description: Was a full Fact Find completed and recorded on the CRM with sufficient information to justify the recommendation?

label: Comprehensive, justified recommendation on file
description: Is there a comprehensive recommendation on file that meets the customer's needs and is justified by the fact find?

label: Informed customer of the services the company provides
description: Did the adviser inform the customer of the services the company provides while finalising details?
ai_check: Statement must be present and convey the full regulatory meaning; flag if the wording materially deviates from the approved word-for-word script.

label: Told customer key facts and services sent by email
description: Did the adviser say that if a policy is arranged, the key facts document and services will be sent by email?
ai_check: Statement must be present and convey the full regulatory meaning; flag if the wording materially deviates from the approved word-for-word script.

label: Mentioned policy can be placed in Trust free of charge
description: Did the adviser mention the policy can be put into Trust free of charge where applicable?

label: Explained data sharing and asked 'is that alright?'
description: Did the adviser explain information is shared only with the insurer and external verification provider, never passed elsewhere, and ask if that is alright?
ai_check: Statement must be present and convey the full regulatory meaning; flag if the wording materially deviates from the approved word-for-word script.

label: Obtained a clear 'yes' to information sharing
description: Did the adviser obtain an explicit 'yes' from the customer to the information-sharing statement before proceeding?

label: Covered cancellation rights and privacy policy
description: Did the adviser say the policy can be cancelled at any time and reference the privacy policy on the website?

label: Delivered the vulnerability / duty-of-care statement
description: Did the adviser deliver the duty-of-care statement, mention vulnerability, and offer the 'Support When You Need It Most' brochure?

label: Summarised the client's main risks and confirmed agreement
description: Did the adviser summarise the client's main areas of concern/risk and confirm the client agrees before the recommendation?

label: Gave the recommendation and checked 'have I got that right?'
description: Did the adviser state the areas of concern / recommendation and check 'have I got that right?'
ai_check: Statement must be present and convey the full regulatory meaning; flag if the wording materially deviates from the approved word-for-word script.

label: Obtained a clear 'yes' to the recommendation
description: Did the adviser obtain an explicit 'yes' confirming the recommendation before continuing?

label: Explained policy features and benefits
description: Did the adviser explain the product(s), insurer, cover amount, term, premium and why it fits the client's circumstances?

label: Gave the honesty/accuracy and non-disclosure warning
description: Did the adviser warn that questions must be answered honestly and accurately and that inaccuracies could invalidate the policy or affect a claim?
ai_check: Statement must be present and convey the full regulatory meaning; flag if the wording materially deviates from the approved word-for-word script.

label: Explained possible GP contact / 1-in-10 checks
description: Did the adviser explain providers may contact the GP for a medical report or run 1-in-10 application checks?
ai_check: Statement must be present and convey the full regulatory meaning; flag if the wording materially deviates from the approved word-for-word script.

label: Sought consent for the insurer to contact the GP
description: Did the adviser ask whether the customer is happy for the provider to contact their GP if needed?

label: Asked if the client wants to see the GP report first
description: Did the adviser ask whether the client wants to see a copy of any GP report before it is sent to the provider?

label: Allowed the customer to answer every H&L question
description: Did the adviser allow the customer to answer every Health & Lifestyle question themselves?

label: All customer disclosures input accurately
description: Were all customer disclosures input accurately into the application (data-entry accuracy check)?

label: Did NOT lead the customer in their H&L answers
description: Did the adviser avoid leading the customer in their Health & Lifestyle answers? Fail if the adviser steered or suggested answers.

label: Gave the wrap-up recap intro
description: Did the adviser introduce the wrap-up (recap recommendation, confirm outcome, confirm what is being put in place, explain next steps)?

label: Recapped the recommendation after the H&L application
description: Did the adviser recap the recommendation (product, insurer, suitability) after completing the Health & Lifestyle questions?

label: Confirmed the recap still matches what the client wanted
description: Did the adviser confirm the recap is still clear and matches what the client wanted to achieve, with a firm 'yes'?

label: Clearly stated the application outcome
description: Did the adviser clearly state the application outcome (accepted on standard/amended terms, or referred for underwriting)?

label: Explained the outcome correctly for the path taken
description: On risk: explained acceptance and any amended/rated terms and checked the client is happy. Referred: made clear the policy is NOT active yet, with no final decision/premium/start/payment date, and the possible outcomes.

label: Explained add-ons and key policy features
description: Did the adviser explain any add-ons (e.g. waiver of premium) and key points such as exclusions, moratorium, waiting/deferred period or special limitations?

label: Checked 'is that all clear?' on add-ons / key features
description: Did the adviser check the customer understood the add-ons and key features ('is that all clear?') with a firm 'yes'?

label: Confirmed happy with cover, premium and everything applied for
description: Did the adviser confirm the client is happy with the cover, the premium and everything applied for, with a firm 'yes'?

label: Set up the Direct Debit and confirmed start & payment dates
description: Did the adviser take the sort code/account number, confirm the account is in the client's name with authority to set up DDs, and confirm the start date plus first and ongoing payment dates?

label: Took bank details making clear policy not active / no payment taken
description: Did the adviser take the sort code/account number for if the policy proceeds, while making clear the policy is not active yet and no payment will be taken unless accepted and started?

label: Took the customer's preferred payment date
description: Did the adviser take the customer's preferred regular payment date (1st-28th of the month)?

label: Confirmed documents by email and got a firm yes
description: Did the adviser confirm policy documents will be sent by email and obtain a firm 'yes'? Proceed only on a clear yes.

label: Explained exclusions and 30-day cancellation rights
description: Did the adviser explain the policy may not pay out in some circumstances (e.g. suicide in first 12 months / inaccurate info) and that there are normally 30 days to cancel without penalty?
ai_check: Statement must be present and convey the full regulatory meaning; flag if the wording materially deviates from the approved word-for-word script.

label: Reassured on future support
description: Did the adviser reassure the client about ongoing support (personal broker, welcome pack by email, future cover review)?

label: Asked for a Google review
description: Did the adviser ask the customer for a Google review (only where the customer was happy)?

label: Made the friends & family referral ask
description: Did the adviser ask whether anyone else might benefit from a protection review and mention the £30 referral voucher?

label: Explained placing the policy in Trust
description: For life cover, did the adviser explain putting the policy in Trust and its benefits (right beneficiaries, faster payout, potential IHT benefit)?

label: Arranged to contact the nominated trustee
description: Did the adviser arrange to contact the nominated trustee to explain their role and take a contact number?

label: Raised will / estate planning where appropriate
description: Where the client has no will, did the adviser raise estate planning and offer a follow-up with an estate planning colleague?

label: Confirmed the client is happy with the service
description: Did the adviser confirm the client is happy with the service / policy arranged today, with a firm 'yes'?

label: Closed properly and invited final questions
description: Did the adviser explain they are about to start/submit the policy and invite any final questions before doing so?
